THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRM CORPORATION DBA SUPERIOR TILE COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COASTAL CONSTRUCTION P.M., INC.
